title: ValidateIndices argument should not be set for tf.gather function call
description: The ValidateIndices argument should not be set for tf.gather function calls, as it leads to unnecessary computational overhead.
message: The ValidateIndices argument should not be set for tf.gather function calls.

noncompliant.description: Incorrect usage of tf.gather with validate_indices set to True

compliant.description: Correct usage of tf.gather without validate_indices

why_is_this_an_issue: Setting validate_indices to True in tf.gather function calls can lead to unnecessary computational overhead.
how_to_fix: Remove the ValidateIndices argument from the tf.gather function call.

metadata.title: ValidateIndices argument should not be set for tf.gather function call
